text.title: Pattern Selection Failure Modes
text.summary: Five antipatterns in multi-agent pattern selection, with detector + fix.

antipattern.description: Pattern stacking — design.md claims "Hierarchical + Loop + HITL" instead of nesting one inside another.
antipattern.reason: Detect: validator flags `pattern` not in the 8-canonical enum. Fix: pick one primary pattern; declare nested sub-patterns explicitly in `rationale` (e.g. "Hierarchical primary; worker-3 runs an internal Loop pattern").

antipattern.description: Router pattern selected without a real classifier — the "router" is the LLM itself in a free-form dispatch prompt.
antipattern.reason: Detect: `classifier_accuracy` missing or <0.85. Fix: train or rule-set a real classifier; if accuracy cannot reach 0.85, pick `hierarchical` instead — the manager does the dispatch in one call.

antipattern.description: Blackboard pattern without concurrency control — agents read/write the same workspace keys with last-write-wins semantics.
antipattern.reason: Detect: `concurrency_plan` missing. Fix: serialize writes (single-writer queue), use append-only (NDJSON, SQLite WAL), or use a CRDT; if none of these is acceptable, pick `hierarchical` instead.

antipattern.description: Generator and critic on the same base model — both share training-data blind spots; critic approves whatever generator emits.
antipattern.reason: Detect: trace shows critic approval rate > 0.95. Fix: assign different model families (e.g. generator=Claude Sonnet, critic=GPT-5 Opus or vice versa); document in `tradeoffs`.

antipattern.description: HITL gates not listed despite design containing irreversible actions (DB write, payment, deploy, external email).
antipattern.reason: Detect: `hitl_gates` is empty AND task description contains any irreversible verb. Fix: enumerate every irreversible action; gate each with a typed approval check that pauses the run.
